case_title: T.P.COMPANY INC. VS LONG LIFE NOODLE INC.

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL SENT TO AGENT FOR SERVICE LONG LIFE NOODLE INC. RETURNED SIGNED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,415.15 FILED BY T.P.COMPANY INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LONG LIFE NOODLE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF T.P.COMPANY INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LONG LIFE NOODLE INC. $3,739.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,765.00, PLUS INTEREST AT 10% PER ANNUM FROM DATE OF JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,736.09 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $73.15 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT LONG LIFE NOODLE INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LONG LIFE NOODLE INC.
